description: Create documentation and installation setup: Write README.md with project description, installation instructions (go install), usage examples, keyboard shortcuts. Add example config.yaml. Create Makefile with targets: build, install, test, clean. Add .gitignore for Go projects (bin/, .tasks/, etc). Document all TUI keyboard shortcuts and CLI commands.
acceptance_criteria: README.md exists with complete usage documentation
Makefile exists with build, install, test, clean targets

verification.value: Read README and verify all commands work as documented
